_comment: MCP client config for the Veil server. Drop into an MCP-capable agent (Claude Code: .mcp.json; Claude Desktop: claude_desktop_config.json). Pick ONE of the entries below.

veil-remote._comment: Deployed server — set url to your VPS/domain + /mcp (Streamable HTTP).

veil-local._comment: Local server over stdio — spawns it directly. Needs VEIL_FEE_SECRET in env. Path is the repo root.
